title: End Expansion
description: This Datapack/Mod adds new Structures, Items and Mobs to the game.
body:
![f](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3368f3265668eada93c204dd156b460dd42a56af.webp)

## **About** 🛠️

If you are using the datapack, please also use the downloaded file as a resource pack.
The textures are integrated in the mod version. This datapack acts as the unofficial sister of Nullscape. The mod adds new structures, items, and mobs to the game.
For more info, click through this:

**DO NOT use Mods like JEI** - They Wont work, because the Mod is just a Packaged Datapack!

### **INCOMPATIBLE WITH LEXTER'S CATACLYSM**

## **Content ✨**
There Are Multiple Structures to Explore like The End Village Ship, The End Village and even More.
There are multiple new structures to explore — such as the End Village, End Village Ship, and more.

Inside the End Village Ship, you may encounter a mob called the Elytrien.
Walk near it with a Pet Bucket to pick it up. Equip it in your chest slot to fly around like you're using an elytra.
If your hunger or health bar drops, simply eat a Chorus Fruit to regenerate.

You can also pick up the Ender Ministrosity the same way. (Find in "End Factory" = small structure marked with a chest, honey block, dispencer... = is very small, so watch out!)
When held in your hand, it opens a 27-slot UI to store your items — but keep in mind: you can only store items in this UI once.

Feel free to check out all the new food sources: Shulkers, Endermen, the Ender Dragon, and several new bowls!

Huge thanks to **Shadowwalker145** for the amazing music discs **Lost** and **Sunrise**!
Please note: **Lost** is **only** available in version **1.1+**.

There are also new advancements you can unlock in the "End" tab:![lul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba724b1856341fe99d82b18463688d02b5e1ba13.png)

You Can craft yourself an "Pet Bucket" to pick up the "Ender Ministrosity" and the "Elytrien":
![craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43b1441224fb8f406a77cf11d12dc829ff55783b.png)
